purpose: Independent run-end report for FlowPilot skill maintainers. It records protocol, template, model, script, review-standard, automation, or code-pointer issues observed while completing the current project. Its observations do not block current project completion and do not require root-repo fixes inside the current run.

current_project_completion_policy.allowed_current_run_action: If a small issue affects the active project, compensate locally and continue. Preserve the observation for future FlowPilot root-repo maintenance.
current_project_completion_policy.only_true_blockers: Ordinary project blockers such as missing permissions, unavailable dependencies, or required user choices remain handled by the active route, not by this skill-improvement report.

pm_notes_for_human_maintainer: <plain-language note for future manual FlowPilot root-repo cleanup>
